subcodes.first_line: O cherished maidservant of God! Think not that in that land thou art far from these wanderers. Know thou of a certainty that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز خدا کمان منما که در آندیاری و دور از این آوارگان بیقین بدان که
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @East and West; communication between East and West, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @power of love, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
